chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-76 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on MA 254/24 3.For hearing of main case 25-10-2024 None present for the petitioner. **** On 09.08.2024, Mr. Ghulam Abbas Shah, Advocate held brief on behalf of petitioner’s counsel and adjournment was sought. Today, none present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in this matter. Under such circumstances, this petition along with listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
